details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level subdirectories reports/audit/ and reports/board/ per governance contract. reports/audit/ is present but reports/board/ was missing at scan time.

Clawdbot/Moltbot references found in code and config files (excluded reports/audit and docs that document removal). Active code locations: moltbot/sentinel.py, moltbot/promotion_discipline.py, moltbot/orchestrator.py, moltbot/memory_evolution.py, moltbot/board.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py. The moltbot/ directory itself still exists with active Python modules.
